name: Feature Registry Initialization
description: Bootstraps the feature registry for a project from scratch by using Sonnet to scan the full codebase and produce an initial set of features and modules. Triggered by the 'Initialize Features' button.

Managers/FeatureInitializer.cs.content:
class FeatureInitializer
  Features: List<SonnetFeature>
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  Keywords: List<string>
  PrimaryFiles: List<string>
  SecondaryFiles: List<string>
  RelatedFeatureIds: List<string>
  KeyTypes: List<string>
  Patterns: List<string>
  Dependencies: List<string>
  DependsOnFeatures: List<string>
  Modules: List<SonnetModule>
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  FeatureIds: List<string>
  InitializeAsync(string projectPath, CancellationToken ct = default) -> Task<FeatureIndex?>

Managers/SignatureExtractor.cs.content:
enum SymbolKind
    Class, Interface, Enum, Struct, Record, Method, Property, Signal, ExportVar, Function, Const
class ExtractedSymbol
  Kind: SymbolKind
  Name: string
  Signature: string
  LineNumber: int
  Summary: string?
  BaseTypes: string?
class SignatureExtractor
  L51: SupportedExtensions: HashSet<string> = [".cs", ".ts", ".tsx", ".js", ".jsx",...
  L131: ExtractSignatures(string filePath) -> string  // Reads a source file and returns a compact signature block. Returns an empty s...
  L150: ComputeFileHash(string filePath) -> string  // Returns first 12 hex characters of the SHA-256 hash of the file content. Used...
  L170: GetSupportedExtensions() -> HashSet<string>  // Returns the set of file extensions this extractor can handle.
  L176: ExtractStructuredSymbols(string filePath) -> List<ExtractedSymbol>  // Extracts structured symbols from a source file. Returns the same symbols as <...
  L195: GetSymbolNames(string filePath) -> List<string>  // Returns just the symbol names from a source file. Useful for populating <c>Fe...
  L207: ExtractImports(string filePath) -> List<string>  // Extracts import/using/dependency references from a source file. Returns names...

patterns: File hash-based change detection for signature staleness
One-shot Sonnet invocation to produce structured JSON registry
dependencies: Calls Sonnet LLM to analyze code signatures
